data.current_description: Unified endpoint that handles all input types: topics, summaries, YouTube videos, websites, PDFs, and DOCX documents.
data.summary_suggestion: Create presentation from multiple input types
data.description_suggestion: Unified endpoint that generates professional presentations from multiple input sources including topics, text summaries, YouTube videos, websites, PDFs, and DOCX documents. Supports 100+ languages and AI-controlled customization of style, length, and imagery. Returns a presentation object containing the generated presentation ID, status, and metadata. The presentation is asynchronously processed and can be retrieved using the returned ID.
data.reasoning: Original summary is generic and doesn't convey the unified multi-input nature.
